label: Transparent jackfruit pod motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Jackfruit transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a jackfruit pod botanical/product motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete opaque subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A large jackfruit pod from a monsoon orchard, shown as a cutaway cluster: rugged olive-green spiked rind with brown stem, one opened section revealing golden-yellow pulp bulbs and warm chestnut-brown seeds. Botanical accuracy, crisp opaque subject edges, tactile rind spikes, glossy fibrous golden pulp, large marketplace produce scale, fresh monsoon orchard polish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include rind, golden pulp, brown seeds, and short stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves green rind, golden pulp, and brown seed colors, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no plate, no basket, no hand, no knife, no packaging, no marketplace scene, no extra fruit species, no text, no watermark, no floor plane, no shadow, no green or magenta background spill on the subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jackfruit light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Jackfruit", derived from the visible jackfruit pod cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible large scale marketplace system.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape board intended for 3840 x 2160 output; clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels, generous columns, and no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Jackfruit, Jackfruit Pod, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from golden jackfruit pulp, olive-green spiked rind, warm brown stem and seeds, pale fibrous cream interior, monsoon orchard freshness, and large scale marketplace operations. The board must read as jackfruit pod and market produce infrastructure, not generic yellow/green SaaS.
Typography: English marketplace UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 明朝は見出しのみ, Noto Sans JP, 金額, 在庫, 産地. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, inventory and wholesale order data widgets, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, golden pulp primary actions, rind-green navigation and focus states, brown seed/stem dividers, pale fibrous cream surfaces, marketplace dashboard density, subtle jackfruit rind spike microtexture, large scale marketplace system mood.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no candy branding, no pineapple or durian, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Jackfruit", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Jackfruit dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Jackfruit". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the jackfruit pod cutout.
Canvas: 16:9 landscape board intended for 3840 x 2160 output; clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels, generous columns, and no tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Jackfruit, Jackfruit Pod, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same large scale marketplace language as the light board: golden pulp primary actions, olive rind-green navigation and focus states, brown seed/stem separators, fibrous cream highlights, spiked rind microtexture, 8px radius, dense shadcn/tweakcn marketplace component grid. Must read as jackfruit pod and wholesale produce infrastructure, not generic dark SaaS.
Typography: English marketplace UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 明朝は見出しのみ, Noto Sans JP, 金額, 在庫, 産地. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, inventory and wholesale order data widgets, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep seed-ink and monsoon-night market surfaces, golden pulp active states, cream text and highlights, rind-green focus rings and status, warm stem-brown borders, muted rind controls, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls, subtle spiked rind grain and glossy pulp overlays.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no candy branding, no pineapple, no durian, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no misspelling of "Morphous Jackfruit".
